name: Jack Fulton
abstract: John Collins Fulton (June 13, 1903 – November 13, 1993) was an American composer, trombonist, and vocalist. At the age of 17, he started playing the trombone for small-town dances.

about_quotes.speaker: William T. (Bill) Challis
about_quotes.evidence: Yes, Jack Fulton sang that and Skin Young sang the "Chloë" and let's see I think there was another number that we did in the beginning

about_quotes.speaker: John Best
about_quotes.evidence: he played some background on the Paul Whiteman record of “Melancholy Baby” that Jack Fulton sang.
about_quotes.doc_title: John Best interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Diego, California, February 15, 1998
